'''Drenna''' was a young [[Senali (species)|Senali]], daughter of [[Garth (Senali)|Garth]] and [[Ganeed]], and niece of the [[King/Legends|King]] [[Meenon]] of [[Senali]]. She was a great archer.

She befriended [[Leed]], Prince of [[Rutan/Legends|Rutan]], when he came to the moon to be exchanged for the king's daughter, [[Yaana]], because of the laws of Rutan and [[Senali]]. When Leed was kidnapped by some accomplices of [[Taroon (Rutanian)|Taroon]], she helped [[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]] and [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] rescue him. Later, they went to Rutan to negotiate with King [[Frane]] where Leed should stay. Then, they tried to free Yaana, King Meenon's daughter, from Frane's oppressions. After finding Yaana, Frane wouldn't let her go if no [[Senali (species)|Senali]] stayed on Rutan, so Drenna volunteered to do it. While on Rutan, she was attacked by [[seeker]] droids, programmed by Taroon, in order to kill some [[Nek/Legends|neks]]. When Taroon found out that Drenna was in danger, he, Jinn and Kenobi went to rescue her. Finally, she fell in love with Taroon.

==Appearances==
*''[[Jedi Apprentice: The Shattered Peace]]'' {{1st}}
